targets.boundary: Company-wide global operations and value chain
targets.notes: Microsoft aims to become carbon negative by 2030 by reducing Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and removing more carbon than it emits annually.
targets.title: Carbon negative by 2030

targets.boundary: Electricity use for Microsoft data centers, buildings and campuses worldwide
targets.notes: Microsoft targets 100% of the electricity used in its data centers, buildings and campuses to be supplied by renewable energy by 2025.
targets.title: 100% renewable electricity by 2025

targets.boundary: Global electricity consumption across Microsoft operations
targets.notes: Microsoft seeks by 2030 to match 100% of its electricity consumption with zero-carbon energy 100% of the time, further reducing market-based Scope 2 emissions.
targets.title: 100/100/0 zero-carbon energy by 2030

targets.boundary: Historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions from Microsoft operations and electricity use since 1975
targets.notes: By 2050 Microsoft plans to remove from the environment all carbon it has emitted directly and from electricity use since its founding in 1975.
targets.title: Remove historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050
